scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 top-level list streams that the declarative dialect can express directly; the occurrences sub-resource fan-out stream (per-issue GET /issues/{id}/occurrences) requires a Tier-2 StreamHook (sub-resource fan-out is not expressible in Tier 1) and is out of scope for this wave

excluded.reason: sub-resource fan-out per parent issue id requires a Tier-2 StreamHook; not expressible in the declarative dialect alone
